title: Resolve Hardens Under Kaido’s Cruel War
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Yamato, Momonosuke, Unknown person #10, Law, Unknown person #11 as The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
scene: The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Hey!! Yamato grabbed momonosuke and fled below!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop your whining and get a move on!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get your asses down that hole and follow them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The person who will guide the world to its "daw"...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So you keep it a secret...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You also carry the "D." in your name!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm only sharing it, because it trust you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thanks. I wish I could help, but I'm afraid I don't know any more than you do.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: luffy doesn't care about it, but I'm also very interested in the "D." clan.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So there's no way to find out, other than following the Red PoneGlyphs?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It certainly seems that way... In other words, we need to take down the YONKC.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't believe it will be quite as simple as that though...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This isn't a red pone- glyph...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Those things are moving on their own!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm taking all this junk metal that's inside this place!!!

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.text: Killer!! You think this is enough!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop them!! Don't let them get to the roof!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Resolve Under Kaido’s Rule storyline with 46 dialogue beats. The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
